changes_made.description: Baseline run with original verbose-style SKILL.md
changes_made.result: Both tasks scored 10/100. Model delegated to subagents which returned wrong answers, wrote malformed JSON (missing closing braces), and failed to compute correct optimization results.

changes_made.description: Complete SKILL.md rewrite targeting qwen3-30b weaknesses: (1) Added CRITICAL RULES section telling model to never delegate to subagents and always write Python scripts, (2) Provided complete runnable Python templates for 0/1 knapsack DP and facility placement greedy+local search, (3) Emphasized using json.dump() instead of manual JSON string construction, (4) Added verification step to read output file back, (5) Removed theoretical content in favor of actionable templates.
changes_made.result: Both tasks scored 100/100. Confirmed with a second run also scoring 100/100.
